content.query:
--https
select * from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/raw/Unemployment.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) as data1;

--abfss
select * from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'abfss://raw@batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/Unemployment.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) as data1;


--header row as column names(HEADER_ROW)

select * from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'abfss://raw@batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/Unemployment.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) as data1;

--specific columns
select [line number], state,gender,employed,unemployed from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'abfss://raw@batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/Unemployment.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) as data1;


--using alias
select d1.[line number], d1.state,d1.gender,d1.employed,unemployed from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'abfss://raw@batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/Unemployment.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) as d1;

--filter data
select d1.[line number], d1.state,d1.gender,d1.employed,unemployed from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'abfss://raw@batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/Unemployment.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) as d1 where state in ('CA','TX','NY');

--group by
select d1.state,count(*) as cnt from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'abfss://raw@batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/Unemployment.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) as d1 where state in ('CA','TX','NY') group by state

--with clause

select  * from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'abfss://raw@batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/Unemployment.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,    
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
)
WITH(
    [Line Number] INT,
    [Month] varchar(20)
) as d1;



select  * from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'abfss://raw@batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/Unemployment.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    FIRSTROW = 2,    
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
)
WITH(
    [Line Number] INT,
    [Month] varchar(20)
) as d1;

--without header, setting the column names using WITH clause
select * from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'abfss://raw@batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/txns',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) 
WITH
(
    txnid int,
    txndate varchar(20),
    custid varchar(10),
    amount float,
    category varchar(100),
    product varchar(100),
    city varchar(100),
    state varchar(100),
    ptype varchar(10)
)
as txns;


-- define cardinal or column position 
select * from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'abfss://raw@batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/txns',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) 
WITH
(
    txnid int 1,
    state varchar(100) 8
)
as txns;


-- field terminator 
select * from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'abfss://raw@batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/txns',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    FIELDTERMINATOR = ',',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) 
WITH
(
    txnid int 1,
    state varchar(100) 8
)
as txns;

use inceptezdb;

SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'abfss://raw@batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/txns',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    FIELDTERMINATOR = ',',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) 
WITH
(
    -- Format: [Column Name] [Data Type] [Column Index/Ordinal] [Collation]
    txnid int 1,
    state varchar(100) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_CI_AS_KS_SC_UTF8 8
)
as txns;

--set collate at database level
alter database inceptezdb collate Latin1_General_100_CI_AS_KS_SC_UTF8


-- select data without collate
use inceptezdb;
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'abfss://raw@batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/txns',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    FIELDTERMINATOR = ',',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) 
WITH
(
    -- Format: [Column Name] [Data Type] [Column Index/Ordinal] [Collation]
    txnid int 1,
    state varchar(100) 8
)
as txns;
